ddt:Target.Name: V4Y - M2S - Ph2
ddt:Target.Description:
ECU V4Y HITACHI/NISSAN/V6 3,5l X73ph2 & J81ph2
Software version 6160, 6161, 6162, 6163, 6164.
Author : Nicolas DABADIE E-mail: nicolas.dabadie-renexter@renault.com Tel : 78939
Last update 30/09/2005

Data.Name: A catalyst Diag parameter for the GST output - GFCAT
A catalyst Diag parameter for the GST output - GFCAT+1
Back wind screen heating State_CLIM - LARCX
Boolean indicating codes has been learn - CODAPRI3
Boolean indicating eeprom vl3 failure - PPEEPVL3
Boolean indicating status is protected - ETAPRO
Both of brake sw present failure - PP2CFRE
Catalyst Diag completion number of times counter - CNTCAT
Connection status with ECU N°1 - CNXECU1
Connection status with ECU N°10 - CNXECU10
Connection status with ECU N°11 - CNXECU11

Item.Text: AE Rapid TAS learning clear (for factory)

Deactivation due to brake application - DACNCFRE
